title: euploca michoacana
intro: Euploca michoacana, also known as Hierba de San Andrés, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Euploca michoacana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and inflorescences, which are used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
